examples: I like to think they were sent to a nunnery, but in any case they disappeared.
Unsure whether I have been understood, I put in a brisk spurt to the nunnery.
She does not have formal schooling in spite of 19 years studying at a nunnery in Dharamsala.
Parts of the Nunnery were excavated in 2011, revealing it to be a former Roman fort.
Outside the order, this find provokes a cry of, Get me to that nunnery!
